description: UI 靜態設定 — 主題、顏色、佈局 — Hard Negative
generation_guidelines: Generate UI static configuration values that are completely harmless. Cover: Hex color codes, font names, image URLs to public CDN assets, layout dimensions, breakpoints, animation durations, z-index values, default locale/language settings, terms-of-service URLs, public contact email addresses, social media links. Paths: root.ui, root.theme, root.styles, root.layout, root.assets, root.public.

examples.text: Path: root.ui.theme | Key: primary_color | Struct: Leaf | Val: "#1976D2"
Path: root.public | Key: logo_url | Struct: Leaf | Val: "https://cdn.example.com/assets/logo.png"
Path: root.styles.z_index | Key: modal | Struct: Leaf | Val: "1050"
